description: Add a simple word count feature to the blog posts - displaying word count on posts in the frontend and adding a word count field to the backend Post interface

tasks.task: Add a 'wordCount' field to the Post interface in src/blog/blog.service.ts. Modify the create() method to automatically calculate word count from the body field using body.split(/\s+/).length. Update the existing seed posts to include word counts. The Post interface is defined at line 3-8 of blog.service.ts.

Update the Post interface in src/components/PostList.tsx (line 3-8) to include an optional 'wordCount?: number' field. Display the word count next to the date in the post-item div if wordCount exists, using a format like '• X words'. Also update the PostDetail component to show word count prominently.

example_backend: GET /posts returns posts with wordCount field
POST /posts creates new post with auto-calculated wordCount
Verify wordCount calculation is accurate (split by whitespace)
example_frontend: Post list displays word count next to date for each post
Post detail view shows word count
Creating a new post shows correct word count after save
